query:
SELECT 
  o.id,
  o.orderNumber,
  oi.productName,
  COUNT(DISTINCT vm.id) as material_count
FROM orders o
JOIN order_items oi ON o.id = oi.orderId
JOIN product_variants pv ON oi.variantId = pv.id
LEFT JOIN variant_materials vm ON pv.id = vm.variantId
WHERE o.deletedAt IS NULL
GROUP BY o.id, oi.id
ORDER BY material_count DESC, o.id DESC
LIMIT 10;
